title: dolichos oliveri
intro: Dolichos oliveri is a climbing legume plant native to tropical Africa, belonging to the Fabaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Dolichos oliveri include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and managing diabetes, as well as providing relief from rheumatism and other inflammatory conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves, stems, and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are administered orally or applied topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
